headline: American Tower to Post Q2 Earnings: Is AMT a Portfolio Must-Have?
summary: AMT heads into Q2 2026 results with revenue and AFFO growth expected, as 5G, mobile data demand and CoreSite momentum offset the DISH-related churn.

headline: Teraco Co-Founder Behind $3.5 Billion Digital Realty Exit Invests in Panda Hub After Booking as a Customer
summary: Matt Tagg, founder of one of South Africa’s largest internet service providers and co-founder of Teraco Data Environments, discovered Panda Hub as a customer before investing in the Toronto-based car detailing and car care platform.TORONTO, ON, July 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Panda Hub, the car detailing and car care platform serving customers in 100+ cities and expanding rapidly across the United States and Canada, announced a strategic investment from technology entrepreneur Matt Tagg.
